data.title: Law of Simplicity
data.description: Spotify's user interface is designed to be simple and intuitive to navigate.
data.technical_spec: Minimum steps to achieve tasks, clear labeling, and logical content organization.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimized touch targets and navigation elements based on their distance and size for ease of use.
data.technical_spec: Responsive design elements and appropriately sized buttons for better accessibility.

data.title: Doherty Threshold
data.description: Spotify ensures systems respond in under 400ms to keep users engaged.
data.technical_spec: Performance optimizations and asynchronous loading techniques.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Reduces decision-making time by limiting choices on each screen or menu.
data.technical_spec: Prioritizes features most frequently used by analyzing user behavior data.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: A visually attractive interface that enhances perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Utilization of whitespace, color harmony, and consistent typography.
